title: Build a Real-World Multi-Agent AI System using LangGraph,  APIs and Memory
summary: YouTube tutorial on building a real-world multi-agent AI travel planning system with four specialized agents for flights, hotels, itineraries, and responses. Uses LangGraph, Groq Llama 3.3 70B, PostgreSQL memory, and external APIs including AviationStack and Tavily Search, deployed with Streamlit.
